title: ICICI Prudential Life is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Prudential Life is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Prudential Life! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Prudential Life:
ICICI Prudential Life is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life!
